title: Netherite Upgrade Elytra
description: Allows using netherite to upgrade elytra on a smithing table to make them fire resistant
body:
This datapack allows using netherite to upgrade elytra on a smithing table to make them fire resistant.

Smithing elytra is similar to upgrading netherite armors: place an elytra, a netherite ingot, and a netherite upgrade smithing template on a smithing table to obtain the elytra with fire resistance.
